welcome.title: Welcome to MRNote
welcome.body: MRNote is a notebook AI workspace for writing, studying, and building with context that persists. Each notebook can hold pages, files, study materials, and memory. Let's set up your first notebook in about a minute.
createNotebook.title: Create your first notebook
createNotebook.body: Start with the workstream you want to keep alive: a product area, a research topic, a course, or a project. You can rename it later.
createNotebook.clientName.label: Notebook name
createNotebook.whatTheyDo.label: What is this notebook for? (optional)
createNotebook.whatTheyDo.placeholder: Specs, pages, study materials, and memory for the notebook AI OS build
pasteNote.title: Drop in a real page
pasteNote.body: Paste something real and unfinished — a meeting note, a reading excerpt, a draft plan, a chunk of research. MRNote will turn it into a page the AI can work with and remember later.
pasteNote.label: Note content
pasteNote.placeholder: Notebook workspace should be fully windowed. Study uploads should auto-create overview and notes pages. Search needs to cover pages, files, study assets, memory, and recent AI actions.
pasteNote.hint: Paste a real fragment from your work — rough is fine. The goal is to give the notebook something meaningful to build on.
memoryPreview.title: Here's what MRNote remembered
memoryPreview.body: These are the kinds of facts and work threads MRNote extracts from each page. Ask about them later and the AI can reuse them with traceability.
memoryPreview.example1: Notebook workspace should stay fully windowed instead of using fixed side panels.
memoryPreview.example2: Study uploads should auto-create overview, chapter, and notes pages.
memoryPreview.example3: Search needs to cover pages, files, study assets, memory, and recent AI actions.
memoryPreview.caption: MRNote remembered:
memoryPreview.subcaption: Every session can query, trace, and cite these memories.
memoryPreview.note: Full extraction runs in the background; this is a preview of what gets stored.
nextSteps.title: You're ready
nextSteps.body: Everything is set up. Here's what happens next:
nextSteps.item1: Open pages, files, study materials, and AI windows side-by-side on the notebook canvas
nextSteps.item2: Let AI help on the current page, current notebook, and long-term memory at the same time
nextSteps.item3: Upload material and turn it into generated pages, chunk-grounded answers, and flashcards
nextSteps.item4: Upgrade when you need more notebooks, AI actions, and advanced memory workflows
